zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne de Hastings於1438年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾科比 姆可洛時，她的父親Sir Leonard Hastings42歲，母親Alice Camoys38歲。她於大約1438年與Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年41歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne de Hastings于1438年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾科比 姆可洛时，她的父亲Sir Leonard Hastings42岁，母亲Alice Camoys38岁。她于大约1438年与Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年41岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne de Hastings was born in 1438, in Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Leonard Hastings, was 42 and her mother, Alice Camoys, was 38. She married Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth about 1438, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1479, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne de Hastings est née en 1438, à Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Leonard Hastings, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Camoys, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth environ 1438, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1479, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England: Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne de Hastings 1438 in Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Leonard Hastings 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Camoys 38. Sie hat um 1438 in England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1479 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne de Hastings è nata il nel 1438 nel Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Leonard Hastings, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Camoys, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth circa 1438, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1479, nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne de Hastingsが1438年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ムクスロで生まれた時，父Sir Leonard Hastingsは42歳，母Alice Camoysは38歳であった。約1438年にイギリスイギリスでSir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで41歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne de Hastings(이)가 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 커비 무스로이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Leonard Hastings(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Camoys(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

pt.Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England: Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne de Hastings nasceu em 1438, em Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Leonard Hastings, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Camoys, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth aproximadamente 1438, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1479, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England: Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne de Hastings родилась в 1438 г. в местности кирби муксло, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Leonard Hastings было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Camoys, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth около 1438 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1479 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия.

Murió en 1479, en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
